creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Thanks for submission, BitchX does indeed need to be updated (and more 
love!).  However, it's usually preferred to track official releases instead 
of snapshots from SVN.  Can you confirm with upstream when do they plan to 
officially release the new version (so distfile is available from sf.net)? 
It would be nice if released version would be more FreeBSD friendly so we do
not have to patch it (or at least carry only very speficic patches that
cannot be included upstream for some reasons).
